name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: It's time to start launching some of these campaigns >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c60ae/24c69fd9/99ed3566/189a1240/3552965585/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE941N_digital_email_20170921_RunToWinUpdate_inact&source=WQEFE941N_digital_email_20170921_RunToWinUpdate_inact")
---

Peter,

When thousands of women come knocking on your door, you have to figure out a way to answer.

That's exactly what we had to do in the weeks after the election and around the women's march when an unprecedented influx of women came to EMILY's List asking how to run for office. So we launched Run to Win.

Eight months later, I am proud to report that more than _**18,000 women**_ have reached out to us about running for office -- almost half with plans to run in the next two years for state and local office!

The time for these women to start filing the paperwork to run and launching their campaigns is fast approaching.
**[Donate $3 to continue building the infrastructure we need to help these thousands of women run-- and WIN.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c60ae/24c69fd9/99ed3566/189a1242/3552965585/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170921_email_RunToWinUpdate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+Donate+3+to+continue+building+the+infras&utm_campaign=WQEFE941N_digital_email_20170921_RunToWinUpdate_inact&source=WQEFE941N_digital_email_20170921_RunToWinUpdate_inact")**
Earlier this year, we announced our most extensive training schedule EVER. We've already traveled to 14 cities across the map (with 11 more to go before the year is over!) and have already trained nearly _**1,500 women,**_ with more to come in the months ahead.

We held our first-ever online training. We created an online community for women to ask questions and learn from the experts and folks who've done it. And we've held two Facebook Live events to help women get prepared to run.

And there's plenty more on the way!

None of this work would be possible without your support. With every woman we train, we can help get another campaign off the ground.
**Donate $3 to help thousands of pro-choice Democratic women run for office for the first time:**
**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Run-To-Win-Update](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c60ae/24c69fd9/99ed3566/189a127c/3552965585/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170921_email_RunToWinUpdate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgRunToWinUpdate&utm_campaign=WQEFE941N_digital_email_20170921_RunToWinUpdate_inact&source=WQEFE941N_digital_email_20170921_RunToWinUpdate_inact")**
Thanks, and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c60ae/24c69fd9/99ed3566/189a127d/3552965585/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170921_email_RunToWinUpdate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=WQEFE941N_digital_email_20170921_RunToWinUpdate_inact&source=WQEFE941N_digital_email_20170921_RunToWinUpdate_inact")

|

**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170921-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team --

GOP Senator Bill Cassidy just failed what _he_ named "the Jimmy Kimmel Test."

When Cassidy went on Jimmy Kimmel's show this summer, he told Jimmy he'd only support a bill that would make sure children got the healthcare they need no matter what their pre-existing conditions were or what their parents made.

But then, not only did Cassidy break his promise -- he _introduced_ a health care bill that went against everything he said he'd stand for. And the Senate is about to vote on it.

Today we're launching NEW ads calling out Cassidy and Republicans in key states for failing not only the "Jimmy Kimmel test" but their constituents too.

**We may only have six days to send a loud and clear message to the GOP, team, and we need your help to get the job done. Please, chip in $1 to help Senate Democrats in this fight AND help make sure voters know that anyone standing with Cassidy doesn 't pass the test for re-election:**

The stakes couldn't be higher. The Graham-Cassidy-Heller bill to repeal Obamacare not only cuts protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions but ends Medicaid as we know it, sets us up for skyrocketing health care costs, AND could leave an estimated 32 million Americans without healthcare coverage. That's plain wrong.

With the Senate expecting to vote on Obamacare repeal in less than a week, we need to make sure we do all it takes to stop them in their tracks before it's too late. name: John Kasich
subject: I need your help
body:
Enough is enough with the partisan bickering. There's a reason
Congress' approval rating is so low.

Peter, enough is enough with
the partisan bickering. There's a reason Congress' approval
rating is so low.

The American people want lasting
results that will only come from bipartisan solutions to our
greatest challenges, like health care.

It's been done before and it can
happen again. When I was in Congress in the 90's, both parties
worked together on welfare reforms and those reforms continue to
serve the American people well today because we worked together
to improve the lives of our constituents.

Our message on this health care
debate is having a big impact but there is a lot more work to do.
Just last week, I joined nine other governors, Republicans,
Democrats and Independent, in sending another letter to Congress
calling for a bipartisan solution.

Please consider helping us fight
for a bipartisan solution by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or
whatever you can to help us continue spreading this message.

I was also on several news shows
to discuss this issue if you'd like to watch them below:

CNN - AC360

MSNBC - Hardball

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help us get this important message out. America can do
better!

-John

P.S. Read my op-ed on the
dangerous path America is going down with our growing national
debt:

Forbes: The Record Surge in Our
National Debt is an Urgent Wake-Up Call for American Families

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.

name: Team Kaine
subject: New poll: 43 - 46
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
| **New poll numbers from Suffolk University show a tough race.**
**Don 't let Virginia lose a key voice in the Senate. [Pitch in now >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=I8ezDGAHh1x4eBQDzIRB8f65qzwwLVQk)**

**[DONATE](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=mRpYV6yssxjx8XbF7Q4pO%2F65qzwwLVQk)**
---

Derek -- A new poll came out earlier this week, and it gave me a jolt -- so I wanted to share it with our key supporters:

**Only 43% of poll respondents said that Tim Kaine should be reelected to the Senate, compared to 46% who said he shouldn 't be. 11% were undecided.**

We know that Tim is a much-needed progressive voice in the Senate who is committed to putting Virginians first -- and we really can't afford to lose his leadership in Congress. **But it's clear we have a tough race on our hands -- [please make a donation to help us reach more voters and get ready to win this race.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=cxyKWSABAI%2BPq7oorVFo%2Bv65qzwwLVQk)**

The good news is that this is just one poll -- we've seen others that show Tim in a stronger position -- and right now, a majority of Virginians approve of Tim's work. But we know from past elections that approval doesn't always result in a win: In August of 2013, Virginia Senator Mark Warner had even higher approval ratings than Tim does -- _and he still nearly lost his 2014 election._ We can't take anything for granted.

**This campaign isn't a sprint, it's a marathon. That means we need to be fighting for Tim every single day, the same way he 's fighting for Virginians in the Senate. [We can't let up -- can you spare a few dollars to make sure Tim has the sustained support he needs to win reelection?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Bx1%2F4BC0BHClEiv%2Fo1JpF%2F65qzwwLVQk)**

[**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XMFEZazlrRvXCRWfdEidn%2F65qzwwLVQk)
---

Tim is standing strong in the Senate against the worst elements of Donald Trump and Republicans' dangerous agenda. But if we're not vigilant, the GOP and right-wing special interests could replace him with an extremist like Corey Stewart, a "mini-Trump" who will simply act as a rubber stamp for that agenda.

**[We're building a massive grassroots campaign to make sure Tim remains our senator. Will you pitch in now to join us?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nlw%2BnIctElH7mJDDXPUIA%2F65qzwwLVQk)**

Thank you for your support,

Keren

Keren Charles Dongo, Team Kaine Campaign Manager
| | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=87PqN%2BjkH1IVrx2NEOi%2FDP65qzwwLVQk).
---

subject: If we can win in Alabama, Derek...

Help elect Doug Jones in Alabama.
---
**Split a donation between Doug Jones and the DNC to help elect Doug to Congress and Democrats around the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235f3/4067b0a/396079e86/7e637f80/3989317473/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170922_tp_nd&source=em_20170922_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170922_tp_nd")****
Do you know what a "Kansas City Shuffle" is, Derek?

It's a confidence scam that relies on sleight of hand and misdirection to distract people from seeing what's really going on -- and that's exactly what Republicans in Congress are trying to pull over on the American people today.

As Donald Trump captures the spotlight every single day, his cronies Mitch McConnell and Paul Ryan are waiting in the shadows, biding their time for the right moment to turn their party's agenda into laws that hurt hardworking American families. We're seeing it right now with their latest health care scheme.

The way we stop them is by winning elections. We have a real opportunity to take back a seat in the Senate this December in Alabama, where Doug Jones -- a lifelong fighter for middle-class Democratic values -- is running to take over Jeff Sessions' vacant Senate seat.

Winning this race means having another voice in the Senate to fight back against Trump and sending a message to the entire Republican Party that Democrats can win anywhere. That's the exact kind of momentum Democrats need to give our candidates the boost needed to mobilize and win in 2018.

Let's use our grassroots power to show Doug Jones and Democrats running in Alabama and across the country we have their backs -- pitch in $3 or more today to split a donation between Doug's campaign and the DNC.

name: The White House
subject: President Trump Defines American Leadership
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9c7788628bf1f030166e478c932a4e415f6cbbb062deca2f81430b34a88d832a83cb8cd3364b10d0fd138c849ca93731f52fddac13cf5347)
# The President's Weekly Address
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9c7788628bf1f030010ad2fe637951a9d5dc31f5e40bda5912ad418e3f97b10351bede85b2d91aff9cc35dfd5efa7f8698c2f6c89649d0b5) \------------- **The United Nations General Assembly in Photos**
President Donald J. Trump participated in his first United Nations General Assembly this week where he met with world leaders and delivered his first speech at the U.N.
[See the week in photos](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9c7788628bf1f0306038165d3d0bbf88a801dacd86d154db8eaa22c7a664f41235581455e0adaf10b9679c40d7da7baf54a6faf19e90e22a)**President Trump Defines American Leadership**
At the 72nd United Nations General Assembly this week, the President delivered a message of putting each countries' citizens first and joining together to combat common challenges. The President met with leaders across the globe as he reaffirmed America's strong bonds with our allies and discussed how we can work together toward promoting peace and prosperity and uphold sovereignty and accountability.
[See more from the week at the United Nations](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9c7788628bf1f03064aa892ad7a3bd61bae2d7e2eeb622d88ccaa97da2e7de1d1f7d5b815a932e72b1c748ca0415855e38d5f10702416e4f)**Hurricane Maria**
President Trump and his team continue to monitor Hurricane Maria and are working to gain greater access to disaster affected areas. The President has approved emergency declarations for Hurricane Maria impacted areas in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands. Additionally, the President has ordered the Department of Defense to provide support to Mexico.
[Get more information for Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9c7788628bf1f030c468b0291d2618fcc6199f8df6fb1a8e11be3a0d5831d77e0018b29a2d8be40437f86e594098107316a618a38c953f60)
# Photo of the Day
**First Last Melania Trump at the United Nations General Assembly** | September 20, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)
# COMING UP
Today, the Vice President will meet with the Governor of Maine at the White House to discuss health care and tax reform and will then travel to Indiana to discuss health care and tax reform with local business leaders. Tomorrow, First Lady Melania Trump will lead the Presidential delegation to Canada to attend the Invictus Games Toronto 2017.

---

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9c7788628bf1f0304c37d5b0b49ad964a7a827f3b817df97acf478e7a2d8539dfc05839499d2c54753bc46ec2aca42cd183adb07424ad3ce) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9c7788628bf1f030b2593535ca4f36853ff15723a5e7e5fe85f46a78ae3cd8c05e4bfad8699c83ca6827891e35285e07cd6dad41a6f378b6) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43aa4de331eeb338a57a824a94907a5eb30dfcef1357bc14e2f8b5648c300ecd27a2d8dba88a8e3dbdaf1c05962ce9ca2)
---

name: did-you-see@dscc.org
subject: A message from President Obama:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
If we can keep fighting for seven more days, the Republican window to pass Trumpcare with just 50 votes will close, and we will have won.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170922-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team --

President Obama delivered some powerful remarks about the health care fight this week:

> _" It's certainly frustrating to have to mobilize every couple of months to keep our leaders from inflicting real human suffering on our constituents. But... typically that's how progress is won. And how progress is maintained."_
President Obama is right. For the better part of eight months, we've repeatedly rallied to rebuff Republican attempts to repeal Obamacare.

That's incredibly frustrating, but it's the Republican plan: wear us down so they can ram through this dangerous piece of legislation.

But if we can keep fighting for seven more days, the Republican window to pass Trumpcare with just 50 votes will close. And in doing so, we'll protect care for millions of friends, relatives, neighbors, and strangers. We will save lives.

Those are the stakes, but Democratic Senators can't do it alone. They need you.

[**Answer President Obama 's call to action. Chip in $1 right now to send an unmistakable message to Republicans that there is a price to pay for taking away health care from millions of Americans.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170922-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

The truth is, the only thing standing in Republicans' way right now is Democratic Senators and our willingness to stand with them.

We all know the stakes, and time is running out before a vote.

**Every donation we receive right now sends a message to Republicans that there is a price to pay for their effort. Believe us, they 're watching. Chip in $1 today:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/protect-obamacare**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170922-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for being a part of this fight,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. body:

---

Peter,

Helped expand Medicaid to more than 600,000 Michiganders.

Blocked a Republican-led "license to bully" bill.

Led a party caucus in the Michigan state Senate, making history as the first woman to do so.

Gretchen Whitmer accomplished all of these things (and more!) in the Michigan state legislature.

Just imagine what she would be able to do as the chief executive -- that's why she's running for governor of Michigan, and that's why we're proud to have endorsed her.

**[Gretchen has a big end-of-month deadline coming up. Donate $3 to support her, and 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6098/24c69fd9/98cfd65c/189a0be1/2354954415/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/gretchen-whitmer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Gretchen+has+a+big+endofmonth+deadline+c&utm_campaign=WQEFC944N_digital_email_20170922_GretchenWhitmer_inact&source=WQEFC944N_digital_email_20170922_GretchenWhitmer_inact")**

In an important swing state that President Trump narrowly won, we need Gretchen fighting to protect Michigan's women and families as governor. She's had plenty of experience doing just that.

When Michigan Republicans introduced a "rape insurance" bill to ban private insurance companies from covering abortion in the state (essentially asking women to predict if they might be raped and need an abortion), Gretchen took to the floor to share her personal story of surviving rape so that Republicans could see exactly who their bill was affecting.

Trump has already endorsed a Republican in this race, Michigan Attorney General Bill Schuette, who has spent his tenure working to shut down abortion clinics.

With Trump behind Schuette, and the state just barely tipping to Trump in 2016, we are taking nothing in this race for granted.

**Donate $3 now to have Gretchen's back for governor of Michigan. 100% of your donation will go right to her campaign:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Gretchen-Whitmer](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6098/24c69fd9/98cfd65c/189a0be2/2354954415/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/gretchen-whitmer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectGretchenWhi&utm_campaign=WQEFC944N_digital_email_20170922_GretchenWhitmer_inact&source=WQEFC944N_digital_email_20170922_GretchenWhitmer_inact")**

Thank you,

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Resilience
body:
#
Team --
It's been a difficult few weeks for so many Floridians. I want to share my thoughts on Hurricane Irma and our state's response to the storm in a minute, but first, I'd be remiss if I didn't mention our friends and family in Puerto Rico.
They are in desperate need of our help and support after Hurricane Maria. Right now, there is total loss of power on the island, and many don't expect to get power back for months.
[**If you can, please chip in whatever you can afford to support recovery efforts in Puerto Rico >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b7/9e00690/4f0b48a0/24036aaa/1763678045/VEsH/ "https://www.generosity.com/emergencies-fundraising/maria-puerto-rico-real-time-recovery-fund")
In Florida, things weren't as bad as they could have been, but many people are grieving the loss of a loved one or wondering how they'll get their home or business back to normal. Despite the struggles we've endured, I'm inspired by the strength and compassion I've seen -- neighbors helping neighbors, strangers welcoming evacuees into their homes, and so many of you working to help clean up our streets, even when they aren't in your own neighborhood.
[**Watch our message on Hurricane Irma, and if you 'd like, share your story of resilience during the storm with us here.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b7/9e00690/4f0b48a0/24036aad/1763678045/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/share-your-irma-story?source=em170922")
Thank you all for everything.
Bring it home,
Andrew

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b7/9e00690/4f0b48a0/24036aac/1763678045/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b7/9e00690/4f0b48a0/24036aaf/1763678045/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b7/9e00690/4f0b48a0/24036aae/1763678045/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

Peter,

As the head of membership services at EMILY's List, I know this community loves to show their support -- whether it's with shirts, buttons, totes, or stickers.

So I'm really excited to announce that we're launching a brand-new sticker for the fall!

**But first we need your help -- will you vote on the design for our newest sticker?**

**[Cast your vote, then donate any amount, and we'll send you the winning design.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6096/24c69fd9/973062ba/189a3d56/3436493054/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170922_email_vote2017sticker?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Cast+your+vote+then+donate+any+amount+an&utm_campaign=WQENE942N_digital_email_20170922_NewStickerVote_inact&source=WQENE942N_digital_email_20170922_NewStickerVote_inact")**

Do you want to tell the world you elect women?

Or maybe you're more into the retro suffragist slogan of "Votes for Women"?

Or perhaps you're like me and love doing everything local -- resisting, voting, and WINNING.

**We're only printing one of these new designs, so pick your favorite. And if you donate any amount after you cast your vote, we'll send you the winner:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Pick-The-New-Sticker](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6096/24c69fd9/973062ba/189a3d50/3436493054/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170922_email_vote2017sticker?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgPickTheNewSticke&utm_campaign=WQENE942N_digital_email_20170922_NewStickerVote_inact&source=WQENE942N_digital_email_20170922_NewStickerVote_inact")**

Kelly Biggs

Team -- We received a big boost from Joe Biden today when he endorsed Annette Taddeo for Tuesday's special election.

Can you rush $10 now to keep our grassroots campaign running full steam ahead?**](http://act.floridadems. Friend,

Even though communities are still healing after Hurricane Irma, Governor Rick Scott refused to reschedule Tuesday's special election for a critical state Senate seat.

Special elections have been rescheduled due to massive storms before. Rick Scott's refusal to move the special election shows he'll do whatever it takes to pull out a win for the GOP. [**That 's why we need your help.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+your+help&utm_campaign=em092217_2&source=em092217_2&refcode=em092217_2")

**FRIDAY, SEPTEMBER 22nd** **_A Note From Jeanie_** **Dear Derek,** **In case you missed it, Governor Sununu signed an[executive order](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyMg-2FeD1LzVyYKLXpHnrmvP2Q7Mh-2FjA59k2e5PlOwveb7fueoUA-2FHcN48qIXevm2chVnvsvoLb6SGTuyGu0Dlqz0bfuDcaSrMXjyJ5SaMs808_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MBRU1L4ygYLHm-2FexRRo6ZGfX-2BXmanO3WyRKBQOy1IO0e2qwqWDp2WlP-2Bt7-2BLoNacn-2Bo4ulH-2FWHN0iL5puNx4xrmW7ygbexteQVXF-2FmoAvjNrdR3unofjaJVTWlWUtTHGXaxt-2BwgFCHlxIlwh3OH9kbUXZ4ZVcgmreuX66uV6o1UVCBwnD-2Bdv5uWbW1kFyTKAh5eXti1GK4PIihs4G0qFAERgBL1MSCVPn70l99xiiY5coJVjg2SQYDTEZ3yKun4AeLa-2FSCz-2BLGkdiwLI0qlv-2BDg-3D-3D) this week setting up a Millennial Advisory Council. The Council will be comprised of young people born between 1980 and 2000, who will provide their thoughts about what we need to do as a state to keep and attract young people to New Hampshire. From those ideas, policy recommendations will be made.**
**We’ve all heard it, for years now, that New Hampshire is an aging population and we need to attract younger folks. Not unexpected, Governor Sununu doesn’t just talk about the challenge—he is doing something about it.********Whether it’s taking charge of our educational challenges, assuring resources are available for the opioid crisis, putting NH citizens first when it comes to health care, or making sure our state has a workforce to help our economy grow, Governor Sununu is leading.********[Take a minute today and tweet a "Thank you" to Governor Chris Sununu for his leadership! ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyGLcf8n0KqNXT-2BYsTFDTlrA-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MBRU1L4ygYLHm-2FexRRo6ZGfX-2BXmanO3WyRKBQOy1IO0e2qwqWDp2WlP-2Bt7-2BLoNacn-2Bo4ulH-2FWHN0iL5puNx4xrjqMwY42-2BMswsGBz8Pm1weqmlzF5xh7-2FIhrkNv7pc2U-2FvTPjyDsNsgCZGdFJP1UrenRp9vqdAlc7iWqdRYaHeLYGnjplOIwL1G0xhKm-2FjmWDW6ayb8Ld96Ngcoih-2BNwib8dLoA-2FN4rfRBhlxLRfMpy-2BE2qa0i31yjaK19OS4s4CyLtKAjst6Hu1MpFvFqoCw6g-3D-3D)

The Council will be comprised of young people born between 1980 and 2000, who will provide their thoughts about what we need to do as a state to keep and attract young people to New Hampshire. From those ideas, policy recommendations will be made. We’ve all heard it, for years now, that New Hampshire is an aging population and we need to attract younger folks. subject: Believe it or not...

body:
****
**** **** | |
| | **September 22, 2017**
---|---

In the past few months, Paul Ryan has crisscrossed the country, visiting businesses, workers, and families to talk about why we need tax reform. But believe it or not, he's not the only one excited about fixing our tax code. Republicans are unified in our pursuit of a simple, fair tax system for all Americans. From President Trump, to Senators and members of the House, conservatives know that this is our once-in-a-generation opportunity to boost the economy, raise wages, and give a big tax cut to the middle class.

You've heard what Paul has said about our broken tax code. Now, a week before House Republicans release our plan to fix it, here's what other Republicans are saying.

| **** | **The Milwaukee Journal- Sentinel**
---
**Donald Trump: We must fix our self-destructive tax code******

_
Today, the hopes and dreams of American workers and their families remain a top priority for my administration. That is why we are launching efforts to reduce the crushing tax burden that is harming our companies and our workers.

Our self-destructive tax code costs Americans millions of jobs, trillions of dollars and billions of hours spent on compliance and paperwork.

To fix this, we have made the foundation of our job creation agenda fundamentally reforming our tax code for the first time in more than 30 years. I want to work with Congress on a plan that is pro-growth, pro-jobs, pro-worker and pro-American._

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MzA3MTk1MDUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMjc0NTI5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
| **** | **Forbes**
---
**Kevin Brady: 2017 Is Our Year To Make History On Tax Reform**********

_
President Reagan put it best on the day he signed tax reform into law. "Fair and simpler for most Americans," he said, "this is a tax code designed to take us into a future of technological invention and economic achievement, one that will keep America competitive and growing into the 21st century."

Flash forward 31 years and you can't even recognize the fundamental tenets that made the 1986 tax reform such a triumph for the American people.

Fairness has been replaced by favoritism for Washington special interests. Simplicity and certainty have been supplanted by complexity and incredible frustrations for the American people. American competitiveness has become a casualty of Washington's inaction - and now the American people are watching good-paying jobs and U.S. manufacturing plants move overseas to countries with more competitive tax systems._

_Among the biggest drags on our nation 's economy in recent years have been excessive regulation and a tax code that is not competitive with the rest of the world. While we have made progress in Washington to ease the regulatory burden, now is the time to enact meaningful tax reform.

**Orrin Hatch: Lifting The Middle Class Through Tax Reform**

_President Reagan put it best on the day he signed tax reform into law. Tax reform for the 21st century means rewarding hardworking families by closing unfair loopholes, lowering tax rates across the board, and simplifying the tax code dramatically.
